clarification.batch: clarify("Which SDXL checkpoint file (ckpt_name) should I use?")
clarification.clarification_message: Which SDXL checkpoint file (ckpt_name) should I use?
clarification.message: To switch to SDXL, I need to know which specific SDXL checkpoint model you want to use (e.g., "sd_xl_base_1.0.safetensors", "sdXL_v10.safetensors", or another filename). Which model should I load?

route_metadata.guidance: DeepSeek browser key submission is supported and stored locally.
DeepSeek browser key submission is supported and stored locally.
